hero.title: End-to-end support, every step
hero.subtitle: From your first inquiry to settling into life abroad — here's exactly how Masomo Now helps.
hero.quote: The worst thing that can happen to you is not failing to fulfill your dreams — the worst is not dreaming at all.

items.a: It depends on the institution — most accept IELTS, TOEFL, PTE, or Duolingo, and several of our partner schools also offer in-house English preparation programs if you don't have a qualifying score yet.
Yes — several of our partner institutions offer University Transfer (UT) programs that let you complete initial credits before transferring into a full degree.

items.q: How long does the process take?
items.a: Timelines vary by destination and season, but most students move from first consultation to a study permit decision within 3 to 6 months. We'll give you a realistic timeline for your chosen program during your consultation.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.body: Book a free consultation and we'll tell you exactly what your next step should be.
